basedOnDefaultsVersion: FLOW-01 v1.0.0 (XIIGEN_FREEDOM_DEFAULTS — fresh root install, no cascade hop)

lineage.introduces: Fresh root install at platform v1.0.0 with ZERO FREEDOM overrides — third-party tenant for V-13(D) Phase 5c cross-tenant separation confirmation; deliberately not part of the acme→northwind cascade chain

overridesNote: Tessera Collective installs FLOW-01 directly from the xiigen-platform v1.0.0 baseline and does not introduce any FREEDOM-config overrides. Their tenant profile exists to prove that the V-13 cascade-coherence verdict holds for a third tenant outside the acme→northwind cascade. Drift comparison: tenant-c-tessera-v1.0.1 vs platform-source MUST be 0 px (because zero overrides are active and FLOW-01's adaptation surface is server-side-only — see V-15-DRIFT-PASS-CONTRACT.md).

deploymentInstructions.seedMethod: no-op — tessera does not seed any FREEDOM keys for FLOW-01; they fall through to the platform v1.0.0 defaults under their AsyncLocalStorage context
deploymentInstructions.sampleSeedScript: // no overrides to seed; tessera tenant context returns XIIGEN_FREEDOM_DEFAULTS unchanged

testsRunForThisProfile: FC-ADAPT-1 (default fallback for unknown tenant — covers tessera by construction)
verificationContract.note: Tessera does not have its own FREEDOM-override test class; FC-ADAPT-1 already covers the contract for non-cascade tenants (default values returned in the absence of overrides). Tessera tenant context returns rate_limit=60, ttl=86400, inviter='you', community='our community' — i.e., the platform v1.0.0 defaults — exactly as XIIGEN_FREEDOM_DEFAULTS specifies.

machineInvariantsPreserved: Event names: AccountCreated, VerificationEmailRequested, VerificationCompleted, OnboardingCompleted
Material type literals: workspace_setup, flow_tutorial, community_invitation
Idempotency key format and outbox ordering (storeDocument before enqueue)

v15DriftContract.expectedDrift: 0 px on every PNG (byte-identical to platform-source baseline)
v15DriftContract.rationale: Tessera has zero FREEDOM overrides for FLOW-01 and falls through to platform v1.0.0 defaults under their AsyncLocalStorage context; therefore the rendered output of every kiosk page is pixel-identical to the platform-source capture
v15DriftContract.observedDrift: 0 px (V-13 instance D + V-15 instance C drift comparison: 252/252 byte-identical pairs vs platform-source; PASS per contract component 1)

v13InstanceD.purpose: Third-tenant cascade-coherence confirmation — proves that a tenant OUTSIDE the acme→northwind cascade installs FLOW-01 cleanly and renders pixel-identical to the platform baseline (because their adaptation surface is empty)
v13InstanceD.isolationFromCascade: tessera-collective is not in the acme→northwind cascade chain; its FREEDOM context contains no inherited overrides from acme; the AsyncLocalStorage scope correctly isolates tessera from acme/northwind tenant contexts
v13InstanceD.crossTenantIsolationDeferred: V-16 cross-tenant JWT isolation tests fire at Phase C9 (cascade row 10) with three pairs (A↔B, B↔C, A↔C); this row 8 audit only certifies that tessera renders correctly in its own context

connections.$comment: Per-tenant CI/CD connection config (Phase C12, DEV-115, 2026-04-26) — schema per TENANT-CICD-CONNECTION-GUIDANCE-v1.0 §TENANT PROFILE SCHEMA. connectionVerified=false is the initial state; ForkFlowHandlerService's Step-0 preflight sets it to true and writes lastVerifiedAt when the checkConnection() call returns reachable=true + hasRepoScope=true. If a fork session reads connectionVerified=false it MUST run the preflight before proceeding (Rule F-1).
